document: MOBIUS MMV Frontier Chat Trial Pack
author: Taiko Toeda
authorship_rights_separation: Taiko Toeda is the author. MOBIUS LLC is the corporate rights and license holder.

license.commercial_or_proprietary_use: Requires a separate license from MOBIUS LLC.

purpose: Single-paste prompt-level MOBIUS MMV trial for frontier model chat windows.
positioning: Demonstration artifact. It emulates L0 v8.4 / RC3.3 answer-entitlement behavior at prompt level and does not claim to be the full MMV runtime.

format_decision.reason: Markdown is the most paste-friendly format for frontier chat boxes: it preserves headings, tables, route ladders, and code blocks while staying readable to humans and models.
format_decision.json_role: This file records metadata and source coverage only.

package_breakdown.decision: Keep the system overview and mathematical doctrine as independent full documents, not summaries.
package_breakdown.reason: Frontier model chat windows can comfortably read this package size, and the independent-file layout preserves authority, provenance, and modeling scope boundaries.

non_claims: Not the full deployed MMV runtime.
Does not include structural RoutingEngine code.
Does not include Box indexes or retrieval.
Does not include live verification tools.
Does not include hidden runtime audit logs.
Does not validate Medium RC3.3 as having Large RC3.3 quality.
Does not claim independent Core-500 validation.
recommended_use: Paste the Markdown file into a frontier model system/developer instruction field when available.
If only a normal chat box is available, paste it as the first user message and ask the model to follow it for the session.
Use it as an MMV experience/demo layer, not as benchmark evidence for the full system.
